Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, up.applicability, count(*) AS count 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" = up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin" AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE up.upgrade != 0 AND bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/1f253e6070e42a6ebe90bfb8c54895bdbc0cd40ca37709293a8a62153ad9b397/987be8f4-7ce8-41b4-98d0-c2fe817e1c1e/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
